ddls:
CREATE TABLE "apps" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each app */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the app */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the app's features and offerings */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action link for more details about the app */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the app */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer of the app */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Launch date of the app */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the app */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the app */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the app icon */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the app's official website */,
  "privacy_policy_url" TEXT /* URL of the app's privacy policy */,
  "terms_of_service_url" TEXT /* URL of the app's terms of service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the app being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who provided the rating */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Rating value given by the user (e.g., 4.0) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was provided */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review (if applicable) */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is a verified user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "is_subscribed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is subscribed to the platform's premium services */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the app being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is a verified user */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Count of users who found the review helpful */,
  "unhelpful_count" INTEGER /* Count of users who found the review unhelpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the app for which the trend is tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trend entry */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the app on that date */,
  "rating_count" INTEGER /* Number of ratings on that date */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews on that date */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Category of the trend (e.g., 'Upward', 'Downward', 'Stable') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_trends_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the app related to the notification */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., 'App Update', 'New Feature', 'Promotion') */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id")
)
